description: Workflow for processing pet entity including enrichment, normalization, and logging
name: pet_entity_processing_workflow

transitions.description: Start processing pet entity by adding timestamp
transitions.end_state_description: Timestamp has been added to pet entity
transitions.name: start_pet_processing

transitions.description: Normalize the pet type string to lowercase
transitions.end_state_description: Pet type has been normalized to lowercase
transitions.name: normalize_pet_type
transitions.start_state_description: Timestamp has been added to pet entity

transitions.description: Enrich pet entity with category details from external service
transitions.end_state_description: Category details have been added to pet entity
transitions.name: enrich_category_details
transitions.start_state_description: Pet type has been normalized to lowercase

transitions.description: Fire and forget task to log pet creation asynchronously
transitions.name: fire_and_forget_pet_log
transitions.start_state_description: Category details have been added to pet entity
